title: APM: Octo Demo RED Metrics
description: Request, error, and duration-oriented telemetry for the Octo APM demo application. Groups metric samples by service, route, and response code so operators can find request volume, error concentration, and slow-path symptoms.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Service Name' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'APM Domain' = 'octo-apm-demo') and 'Metric Name' in ('http.server.duration', 'http.server.requests', 'apm.service.errors', 'http.server.duration.p95', 'apm.span.duration') | stats count as Samples, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Span ID') as Spans by 'Metric Name', 'Service Name', 'Workflow ID', 'Workflow Step' | sort -Samples

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the Octo APM RED metric signals and identify the hottest route.
Which metric names show elevated errors or latency symptoms?
